simple_types.name: DISABLE_DISABLE_Field
simple_types.code:
type DISABLE_DISABLE_Field is
   DISABLE_DISABLE_Field_Reset,
   SwDisable)
  with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: FORCEPROTECT_FORCEPROTECT_Field
simple_types.code:
type FORCEPROTECT_FORCEPROTECT_Field is
   Force,
   FORCEPROTECT_FORCEPROTECT_Field_Reset)
  with Size => 8;

record_types.name: APPROTECT_Peripheral
DISABLE_Register
FORCEPROTECT_Register

variables.name: APPROTECT_Periph
variables.code:

  with Import, Address => APPROTECT_Base;
